inputs.text: music, speech, reportage, interview, banners, watemarks, animated logotype, nothing is happening, standing still, rigid body bends, rigid object deformation, unnatural bending of hard surfaces, static image, static fluid, statid liquid, warped mechanical parts, slowmo, reversed, walking backwards, noisy, film grain, blurred background, low-quality, standing idle, felt style, pixel art style, puppet animation, claymation style, stop-motion, watercolor painting, oil painting style, time-lapse, fade-out, fade-in, shot transition, scene transition, abrupt transition, jump cut, cut to another shot, multi-shot sequence, edit-like transition, dissolve transition, crossfade, montage, sudden scene change, frame blending between shots, jittery, shaky footage

inputs.value: {"shot":{"composition":"The frame is a handheld low-angle shot from a small vessel, showing the rusted foreground railing slightly out of focus. The midground is dominated by the massive grey and yellow steel structure of the oil platform, rising vertically from the restless sea. The background features a vast, hazy horizon where the dark ocean meets a overcast, muted sky.","camera_motion":"The camera exhibits a natural, amateurish handheld shake with slow, irregular swaying motion as if recorded from a moving boat. The camera performs a very subtle, slow push-in toward the central mass of the platform to emphasize its scale.","film_grain":"The image contains visible digital noise and a slightly low-contrast texture typical of a 2014-era smartphone sensor.","focus":"The visual focus is locked onto the complex iron lattice and service gantries of the platform, maintaining sharpness despite the subtle camera movement."},"motion":{"primary_action":"The massive oil platform remains fixed and stationary, while the surrounding ocean surface exhibits rhythmic, heavy swells that move across the lower frame.","secondary_motion":"The camera gently sways in rhythm with the waves, creating a slight shifting of the perspective against the distant horizon. Wisps of sea mist shift slowly across the middle levels of the structure.","layered_motion":"The foreground railing moves slowly across the frame due to the boat's motion, while the massive platform in the midground remains largely stable. The background horizon exhibits a very slow, subtle vertical oscillation, creating a sense of depth and distance between the viewer and the platform."},"continuity":{"anchored_elements":"The rusted metallic railing in the bottom foreground, the vertical posture of the platform's support columns, and the industrial yellow paint patches on the structure must remain consistent.","spatial_consistency":"The camera maintains a stable eye-level of a person standing on a deck, with the composition axis aligned to the platform's vertical orientation. The relative distance between the boat's railing and the platform is preserved throughout the shot.","readability":"The intricate steel girders of the platform and the horizontal line of the ocean horizon remain the clearest, most readable features in the frame."},"cinematography":{"lighting":"Diffused, flat midday light creates soft, hazy shadows on the platform, emphasizing its cold, metallic texture and the atmospheric moisture in the air.","tone":"The visual tone is authentic, gritty, and grounded in a utilitarian reality, characteristic of unedited mobile device footage."}}
